criteria.name: AI-Powered Task Automation
criteria.description: The app's ability to automate repetitive tasks, set smart reminders, and prioritize tasks based on workload and deadlines.

criteria.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
criteria.description: The tool's capability to understand and generate human language for tasks like summarizing text, drafting emails, and providing conversational assistance.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent to which the app seamlessly integrates with other productivity tools, such as calendars, email services, project management platforms, and communication apps.

criteria.name: Content Creation and Enhancement
criteria.description: The tool's ability to assist in creating various forms of content, including text, images, and videos, and to enhance the quality and clarity of existing content.

criteria.name: Meeting Assistance
criteria.description: Features that aid in meeting transcription, summarization, note-taking, and action item extraction to improve meeting productivity.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app can be customized to individual user preferences and workflows, providing a tailored productivity experience.
